title: seseli calycinum
intro: Seseli calycinum is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is also known as Calycoseed or Yellow Wild Carrot. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. Seseli calycinum is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction to extract its medicinal properties.
